reviews.review_description:
I Have just re-visited and this time I have completed Daedalus and wish there was more!

Simply the most astoundingly beautiful game I have ever played! The iridescent metallic look of the surfaces is so convincing very realisitic as is the feeling of height and flying!  A bit of giddiness, but applied the brake as advised. What a Fantastic creation!

The game looks very nice and is fun to control.  The puzzles are quite easy.  There is no sense of doing something rewarding...its basically jump-float to an obvious platform, jump-float to another obvious platform, then jump-float to another level and start the jump-floating again. I feel like its, in a sense, a baby version of Eclipse.  Seems like there should be more to the game.  Still, it's fun to play for a few minutes.
Everything a VR app should be. Simple and captivating.
The Very Best so Far. The Entire Family Love it... Please Please Please, MORE OF THE SAME
Beautiful gloss. Surreal experience. No couch play but that OK for my fat but.
Eso sí, le faltan más niveles
This game was my first real VR experience. I hope You will make games like this 'cause it was awesome! I recommend it everyone who want to try something special in VR. 5*

reviews.review_title: A bit boring, but very beautiful
reviews.review_description: The mechanics are great, the visuals are very good. I wish I could fly a bit quicker, because it's kind of annoying it takes so long

This is a MUST HAVE if you own an Oculus Go. As a fan of Portal this gave me vibes  and a superior VR experience. I will buy, for sure, downloadable content or a Part II if it comes out. Thank you for doing a great job.
Just wow, brilliant! An incredibly unique concept and very well executed!
Games that try to be the best like this and succeed, are just awesome. When you hit the edge and bounce it feels real! Very fun!

Nice demonstration of vr capability,controller capabilities,physics. One suggestion, sometimes feels boring,pl make it addictive. Also,memory card support is not there. We should be able to install it on sd card. I will give 5 then.

Awesome experience, smooth controls, zero glitches, stunning visuals. Sound could use some improvement though. Repetitive ui gets annoying (could use more variety) and sound design of a few objects seems really off (like liquid metal or the repetitive heavy iron impacts). Music is excellent. Otherwise - great game!

reviews.review_title: Best immersive feeling on Oculus Go
reviews.review_description: This little game provides the best immersive feeling I’ve experienced on the Oculus Go.
Great graphics, smooth control, all around excellent VR experience!

Incredibly beautiful! Just a wonderful world to dive into! Hoping we’ll get part 2 soon, since my only qualm was that the game had just a few too little levels.

So let’s hope all of these well deserved positive reviews are a great motivator for the team behind this game :)

It’s difficult to find truly unique and mesmerizing experiences in any medium, and VR is no exception. Don’t get me wrong, there are some excellent first-person shooters and horror-themed games for the Oculus Go, but you more or less know what you’re getting. With this title, you are transported to a place unlike anywhere you’ve been or anything you can imagine. I love the mystery: is it the future? Another planet? Aliens? Another dimension? You’re left wondering even though there’s a minor backstory. The graphics are so imaginative, surreal, and slightly spooky. The gameplay is tranquil, exhilarating, and nerve-wracking all at the same time. I tip my hat to the developers for a truly unforgettable experience. My highest recommendation!
This is my favorite so far.  Beautiful, intuitive, relaxing, and fun!  Graphics are amazing.  Developers did such a fantastic job.
Great graffics but gets a little repetative.
I'm playing it slow because I don't want it to end!!! The developers created a beautiful immersive experience.
